title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Impresario Entertainment

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Impresario Entertainment
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment:
Impresario Entertainment is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment!
